text: I really love Mr. Robot. Amazon Prime removed it from the platform, so my last option was to build my own server and stream it from there.
I was watering the carrots, and I found this little guy. I tried to adopt him. :D
Harvested some fresh carrots from the garden today with my dad.

text: I was walking to my linear algebra class, and, even if it sounds weird, I'm a real fan of how the sunlight looks.
I can't express how much I love this photo. Without a doubt, this season was the second best of my entire life.
Using another keyboard feels like cheating; my Corne is gonna accompany me until death.
